title: TechnoThePig - Fresh Animations (FreshTechnoThePig)
description: Adds a legendary pig variant to the game!
body:
### **This pack is included in the extensions version of [Programmer Art x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-fresh-animations)!**

**Description**

TechnoThePig - Fresh Animations (FreshTechnoThePig) is a FA addon resource pack that adds a legendary pig variant to the game. Rename a regular pig to "Legend" to get the custom pig variant. Equip the renamed variant with a saddle to get the cape! 

**Info**

This pack is compatible with [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions), meaning that the variants from FreshAnimationsExtensions are not ignored and spawn normally.

**Notable Features**

- Renamed pig variants have a second texture layer on their heads, which allows the crown to render properly. (Same way it is rendered on a player)

> _Known Issues: None_

<details>
<summary>CHANGELOG</summary>

[ v2.1 ] Small fixes

____________________________________________


[ v2.0 ] Restructuring Update (TL;DR: Code/file cleanup & update support)

PIG:
- !This pack can no longer be used without Fresh Animations!
- With the 1.6 release of the FA Extensions it has become possible to separate the entity model from the entity animations. This allowed for much broader support across Minecraft versions and eliminated the need to include animation files from FA in this addon. This pack is now lighter, a lot less complicated on the inside and works across many Minecraft versions. The issue with saddles on baby pigs rendering incorrectly has been fixed.

____________________________________________


[ v1.0 ] Initial Release!

PIG:
- Modified the pig model by adding a second texture layer to the pig head and adjusting UVs, allowing the crown to render properly.
- Made the renamed variant use a custom model (the one mentioned above) instead of the default one.
- Edited the saddle model to work on versions below 1.21.5
- Created the textures for the custom pig and saddle variants. (duh)
- Added compatibility with FreshAnimationsExtensions. The variants from FreshAnimationsExtensions are not ignored and spawn normally.
(Although when using with FAE versions below 1.5.x the muddy pig variant and regular pig variant spawn chances are reversed & saddles on baby pigs render lower than they should. NO BIGGIE)

Rename a regular pig to "Legend" to get the custom variant.
Equip the renamed variant with a saddle to get the cape.

</details>



<details>
<summary>PROPER RESOURCE PACK ORDER</summary>

![Proper Resource Pack Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3933833fe273e49fb408de06b88f9c3a70a59cbf.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Special Thanks</summary>

- [GillsBills](https://modrinth.com/user/GillsBills): For helping me understand how to make a renamed entity use it's own custom model, instead of being bound to the default one. This allowed for just the renamed variants of the same mob to be animated.

- [MidniteDemolisher](https://www.curseforge.com/members/midnitedemolisher/projects): For helping me understand how to make a renamed entity use it's own custom texture when it also uses it's own custom model. This allowed for the renamed variants of the same mob that are animated to have a specific texture, bound to the custom model.

</details>
